title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at IBM India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at IBM India
jsonLd.description:
IBM India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!
